item.title: Yash Chemex Ltd Downgraded to Strong Sell Amid Deteriorating Technicals and Weak Fundamentals
item.description: Yash Chemex Ltd, a micro-cap player in the miscellaneous chemicals sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Sell to Strong Sell as of 30 March 2026. This revision reflects a deterioration in technical indicators despite an attractive valuation and some positive financial trends. The company’s Mojo Score has dropped to 29.0, signalling heightened caution for investors amid mixed signals across quality, valuation, financial trends, and technicals. Time: 7 hours ago

item.title: Mobavenue AI Tech Ltd Downgraded to Hold Amid Mixed Technical and Valuation Signals
item.description: Mobavenue AI Tech Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Other Consumer Services sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Buy to Hold as of 30 March 2026. This adjustment reflects a nuanced reassessment across four key parameters: quality, valuation, financial trend, and technical indicators. Despite strong financial performance and impressive long-term returns, evolving technical signals and valuation metrics have tempered the outlook for investors. Time: 7 hours ago

item.title: Jupiter Infomedia Ltd Upgraded to Sell on Technical Improvement Despite Weak Fundamentals
item.description: Jupiter Infomedia Ltd, a micro-cap player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, has seen its investment rating upgraded from Strong Sell to Sell as of 30 March 2026. This change is primarily driven by a shift in technical indicators signalling a mildly bullish trend, despite the company’s ongoing financial challenges and weak fundamental metrics. Time: 7 hours ago

item.title: Adarsh Plant Protect Ltd Upgraded to Sell Amid Mixed Technical and Financial Signals
item.description: Adarsh Plant Protect Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Pesticides & Agrochemicals sector, has seen its investment rating upgraded from Strong Sell to Sell as of 30 March 2026. This change primarily reflects a shift in technical indicators, while the company’s fundamental and valuation metrics remain under pressure. Investors should weigh the nuanced developments across quality, valuation, financial trends, and technicals before making decisions. Time: 7 hours ago

item.title: Zeal Aqua Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Mixed Financial and Valuation Signals
item.description: Zeal Aqua Ltd, a micro-cap player in the FMCG sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 30 March 2026. Despite posting positive quarterly results and attractive valuation metrics, concerns over its long-term fundamentals and financial health have weighed heavily on the assessment, prompting a reassessment of its quality, valuation, financial trend, and technical outlook. Time: 7 hours ago

item.title: Schaeffler India Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Valuation Concerns and Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Schaeffler India Ltd has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 30 March 2026, reflecting a complex interplay of technical indicators, valuation concerns, and financial trends. Despite strong operational performance and market-beating returns over the long term, the stock’s premium valuation and mixed technical signals have prompted a cautious stance among analysts. Time: 7 hours ago

item.title: Satin Creditcare Network Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Mixed Financial Signals
item.description: Satin Creditcare Network Ltd has been downgraded from a Hold to a Sell rating by MarketsMOJO as of 30 March 2026, reflecting a reassessment of its quality, valuation, financial trend, and technical parameters. Despite posting record quarterly profits in Q3 FY25-26, the micro-cap finance company faces challenges in long-term fundamentals and valuation concerns that have influenced the revised outlook. Time: 7 hours ago

item.title: Excel Industries Ltd Upgraded to Sell on Valuation Improvement and Financial Trends
item.description: Excel Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has seen its investment rating upgraded from Strong Sell to Sell as of 30 March 2026. This change is primarily driven by a marked improvement in valuation metrics, even as the company continues to grapple with subdued financial performance and weak technical indicators. Time: 7 hours ago
